name: Monkey King
description: There's a lot of stories about the Monkey King. Some of 'em are even true.

abilities.name: Mischief
abilities.description: Changes Monkey King's shape using the environment nearby to deceive opponents. Taking damage, attacking, or using any item or ability breaks the disguise. Negates damage for a brief moment upon transforming. Within Roshan's pit and while it is dead, Mischief disguises the Monkey King as himself. The same applies to the. Damage Negation Duration: 0.1. Damage Threshold: 0. Move Speed Bonus: 8%. Rune Search Radius: 300. Creep Search Radius: 200. Tree Search Radius: 350. Mana Cost: 24.5.

abilities.name: Boundless Strike
abilities.description: Applies a portion of Primal Spring max channeling duration of its corresponding level upon at the end location. Cast Range: 1100. Effect Length: 1100. Effect Width: 150. Crit Damage: 135%/165%/195%/225% (195%/225%/255%/285%). Stun Duration: 0.7/0.9/1.1/1.3 (0.9/1.1/1.3/1.5). Attack Charge Cost per Cast: 1. Cooldown: 28/26/24/22. Mana Cost: 85/90/95/100.

abilities.name: Tree Dance
abilities.description: While perched, he is hidden in plain sight. Grants Monkey King flying vision and the Primal Spring ability — a channeled leap attack. Cast Range: 900 (1250). Max Tree Dance Distance: 1850. Unperch Self Stun Duration: 3. Set Vision Radius: 700. Set Vision Radius: 500. Cooldown: 0.9/0.6/0.3/0.

abilities.name: Primal Spring
abilities.description: Springs out from his tree perch, damaging and slowing enemy units in proprotion to the channel duration toward the landing area. Cast Range: Global. Max Leap Distance: 800. Radius: 375. Max Channel Time: 1.75. Max Damage: 110/200/290/380 (460/550/640/730). Max Move Speed Slow: 20%/40%/60%/80%. Cooldown: 18/16/14/12. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Jingu Mastery
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage and lifesteal for a number of subsequent attacks to its master. Counter Duration: 5.5/7/8.5/10. Max Attack Charges: 4. Attack Damage Bonus: 30/80/130/180 (140/190/240/290). Lifesteal: 20%/40%/60%/80%. Buff Duration: 35. Creep Lifesteal Factor: 0.6.

abilities.name: Wukong’s Command
abilities.description: Creates a circular formation of soldiers that spread out from his position. Grants Monkey King bonus armor for its duration. Cast Range: 625 (975). Ring Radius: 300 2nd. Ring Radius: 750 3rd. Ring Radius: (1100). Soldier Attack Interval: 1.1. Self Armor Bonus: 15/20/25. Cooldown: 100/90/80. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Clone Inventory
abilities.description: These unselectable and uncontrollable Clones cannot use the items' active abilities. However, the items' passive effects are applied conditionally.
